linting.notes: golangci-lint runs with 5m timeout and allows parallel runners. Both golangci-lint and gofmt are configured in pre-commit hooks.

testing.mock_patterns: Tests use Ginkgo BDD style with Describe/Context/It blocks. HTTP test servers are started in-process for each test case.
testing.notes: Unit tests in internal/proxy/ test the reverse proxy logic. E2E tests in test/e2e/ require a Kind cluster and are run separately with 'make kind-e2e-test'. The Makefile test target runs only unit tests.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request to main branch. Uses Go 1.24.0 in CI (slightly different from go.mod which specifies 1.24.2, but compatible). CI uses golangci-lint-action@v8 which installs golangci-lint v2.1.6.

build.notes: Multi-stage Dockerfile uses golang:1.24 for build and ubi9 for runtime. CGO is enabled. Binary is statically linked with CGO.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style: Describe/Context/It blocks. Test suite files named *_suite_test.go
conventions.import_style: Standard Go grouping: stdlib, external, internal. Dot imports allowed for Ginkgo/Gomega with nolint:revive comment
conventions.notes: Apache 2.0 license headers required on all .go files. Uses klog for logging. Pre-commit hooks enforce trailing whitespace, EOF newlines, and YAML validation.

test_commands.notes: 18 tests passed in 16.5s. Version mismatch warning between CLI (2.28.1) and go.mod (2.23.4) but tests ran successfully.

container_recipe.notes: Ginkgo binary installed to /go/bin/ginkgo. Can use 'go run github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2/ginkgo' to match exact version in go.mod. Build creates 22MB binary.

results.notes: All 18 unit tests passed. Minor version mismatch warning (CLI 2.28.1 vs go.mod 2.23.4) does not affect execution.

validation.summary: All validation steps passed: deps OK, lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (18/18 passed), build OK (22MB binary)

gaps: E2E tests in test/e2e/ require a Kind Kubernetes cluster and are not included in standard 'make test'
No coverage reporting configured in the test commands
Pre-commit hooks configured but not automatically installed (requires manual 'make install-hooks')
